content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ALTERNATE_PHONES')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ALTERNATE_PHONES]

GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ALTERNATE_PHONES]
(
	[AlternatePhoneID] 		NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[CustomerID] 			NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[Phone] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[PhoneTypeID] 			NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[CallMorning] 			INT NULL,
	[CallAfternoon] 		INT NULL,
	[CallEvening] 			INT NULL,
	[CallWeekend] 			INT NULL,
	[dnc_id] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[intdnc] 				NVARCHAR(64) NULL,
	[LP_AlternatePhoneID]	INT NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] 		BIGINT NULL,
	[LP_PhoneTypeID] 		INT NULL,
	[Division] 				[nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] 			[datetime]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [AlternatePhoneId] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)

GO
